creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag your coffee buddies! 

@foreverrosecafe is one of the unique cafes in Dubai. It has a 2D storybook theme. Dishes and drinks are affordable and nicely presented. 

🖤 My friends and I went here for late night coffee/catch up sesh after dinner. I had Forever Rose Latte (25 AED) and we shared Perfetto Truffle fries (36 AED).
🖤 Breakfast, Salads, Mains, Desserts are also available. I’ve been here for breakfast years ago; had the Enchanted Waffle and love it to bits! 

📍Box Park, Dubai
